
### symbolic execution challenges 


* <em>‘solving' a path’s conditions</em>
* generating way too many paths


### equation solving  {.smaller}


* can generate formula with bounded inputs
* can always be solved by trying all possibilities 
<hr class="vspace" />
* but actually solving is <em>NP-hard (i.e. not generally possible)</em>
* luck: there exists solvers that are <i>often</i> good enough
* … for small programs
* … with lots of additional heuristics to make it work


### way too many paths  {.smaller}


* <em>loops</em> mean often really huge number of paths
* dealing with array <em>accesses</em>? 

   * easiest way --- new path for each index

* need ways to quickly <em>eliminate impossible paths</em>
* won't explore all paths; need to prioritize
* can try to similar paths; process together
